mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leo_gp_numbers (project_id, company_number, gp_no) VALUES (#{project_id}, #{company_number}, #{gp_no})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT lgn.company_number AS identifier FROM leo_gp_numbers lgn INNER JOIN products p ON lgn.project_id = p.id WHERE p.name = #{productName} AND lgn.company_number IS NOT NULL AND lgn.company_number != ''
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT lgn.gp_no AS identifier FROM leo_gp_numbers lgn INNER JOIN products p ON lgn.project_id = p.id WHERE p.name = #{productName} AND lgn.gp_no IS NOT NULL AND lgn.gp_no != '' ORDER BY identifier

SELECT DISTINCT lgn.company_number AS identifier FROM leo_gp_numbers lgn INNER JOIN products p ON lgn.project_id = p.id WHERE p.model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND p.name = #{productName} AND lgn.company_number IS NOT NULL AND lgn.company_number != ''
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT lgn.gp_no AS identifier FROM leo_gp_numbers lgn INNER JOIN products p ON lgn.project_id = p.id WHERE p.model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND p.name = #{productName} AND lgn.gp_no IS NOT NULL AND lgn.gp_no != '' ORDER BY identifier
